Frank O'Brien

Email: frank.obrien@email.com

Summary:
Java enterprise developer with 10 years of experience building large-scale distributed systems.

Experience:

Principal Engineer — EnterpriseSoft (2018–Present)
- Designed microservices architecture using Spring Boot and Hibernate
- Managed Oracle and MySQL databases at scale
- Implemented message queues with RabbitMQ and Apache Kafka
- Built CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Maven
- Led team of 8 engineers

Senior Java Developer — CorpTech (2014–2018)
- Developed REST APIs with Spring MVC
- Wrote integration tests with JUnit and TestNG
- Used Docker for local development environments

Education:
M.S. Software Engineering, Carnegie Mellon University (2014)
B.S. Computer Science, Penn State (2012)

Skills:
Java, Spring, Spring Boot, Hibernate, Maven, Gradle, Oracle, MySQL, RabbitMQ, Kafka, Docker, Jenkins, Git, REST API, Microservices, JUnit, Agile
